metadata.summary: Unofficial Administrative Command Line Interface for Contrast Security

documentation:
# c6t

An unofficial Administrative Command Line Interface (CLI) for Contrast Security.

## Table of Contents

- [c6t](#c6t)
  - [Table of Contents](#table-of-contents)
  - [Features](#features)
  - [Prerequisites](#prerequisites)
  - [Installation](#installation)
  - [Usage](#usage)
    - [Login](#login)
    - [Configure](#configure)
    - [Get Agent Configuration File](#get-agent-configuration-file)
  - [Project Structure](#project-structure)
  - [Development](#development)
    - [Setting Up](#setting-up)
    - [Running Tests](#running-tests)
  - [Contributing](#contributing)
  - [License](#license)

## Features

- Login to your Contrast account and save your API credentials to your local machine.
- Configure your API credentials manually.
- Download the agent configuration file to your local machine.
- Integrate with Secure Code Warrior to fetch training exercises and videos for identified vulnerabilities.
- Download the latest Contrast Security agent from the Maven repository.

## Prerequisites

- Python 3.8 or higher

## Installation

```shell
$ pip install c6t
```

## Usage

### Login

This will prompt you to login to your Contrast account and save your API credentials to your local machine.

```shell
$ c6t login
```

### Configure

Alternatively, you can configure your API credentials manually.

```shell
$ c6t configure
```

### Get Agent Configuration File

This will download the agent configuration file to your local machine.

```shell
$ c6t agent-config
```

## Project Structure

```
c6t-main/
├── .github/               # GitHub configuration files for CI/CD
│   ├── dependabot.yml
│   └── workflows/
│       └── dump-env.yml
├── src/                   # Source files for the c6t package
│   └── c6t/
│       ├── api/
│       │   ├── agent_config.py
│       │   ├── __init__.py
│       │   └── maven_repo.py
│       ├── configure/
│       │   ├── __init__.py
│       │   └── credentials.py
│       ├── external/
│       │   └── integrations/
│       │       └── scw/
│       │           ├── __init__.py
│       │           ├── contrast_api.py
│       │           └── contrast_scw.py
│       ├── templates/
│       │   ├── contrast_security.yaml.j2
│       │   └── contrast_security_env.yaml.j2
│       ├── ui/
│       │   └── auth.py
│       ├── __init__.py
│       ├── __main__.py
│       └── cli.py
├── tests/                 # Unit tests
│   ├── data/
│   │   ├── checksumfile
│   │   └── testfile
│   ├── __init__.py
│   ├── test_cli.py
│   └── test_maven_repo.py
├── .gitignore
├── .python-version
├── LICENSE
├── README.md
├── pyproject.toml         # Project configuration
├── requirements-dev.lock
└── requirements.lock
```

## Development

### Setting Up

1. Clone the repository:
    ```shell
    $ git clone https://github.com/jharper-sec/c6t
    $ cd c6t
    ```

2. Install [Rye](https://rye.astral.sh/):
    Linux/macOS:
    ```shell
    $ curl -sSf https://rye.astral.sh/get | bash
    ```

3. Use Rye to install the dependencies:
    ```shell
    $ rye sync
    ```

### Running Tests

To run the tests, use:

```shell
$ rye run pytest
```

## Contributing

Contributions are welcome! Please read the [contributing guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md) for more details.

## License

This project is licensed under the terms of the Apache license. See the [LICENSE](LICENSE) file for details.

methods.name: c6t.configure.credentials.ContrastAPICredentials.get_credentials_from_file
documentation: Get credentials from file in JSON format

methods.name: c6t.configure.credentials.ContrastAPICredentials.write_credentials_to_file
documentation: Write credentials to file in JSON format

modules.name: c6t.external.integrations.scw.contrast_scw
documentation: Script to query Contrast TeamServer to populate the vulnerability references with Secure Code Warrior video links
Author(s): josh.anderson@contrastsecurity.com / david.archer@contrastsecurity.com / jonathan.harper@contrastsecurity.com

functions.name: c6t.external.integrations.scw.contrast_api._create_authorization_header
documentation: Create the Authorization header for the TeamServer API

methods.name: c6t.external.integrations.scw.contrast_api.ContrastTeamServer.api_request
documentation: Function to call the Contrast TeamServer REST API and retrieve results as JSON

methods.name: c6t.external.integrations.scw.contrast_api.ContrastTeamServer.post_api_request
documentation: Function to POST data to the Contrast TeamServer REST API and retrieve results as JSON

methods.name: c6t.external.integrations.scw.contrast_api.ContrastTeamServer.org_api_key
documentation: Superadmin API call to retrieve the API key for a specific organization

methods.name: c6t.external.integrations.scw.contrast_api.ContrastTeamServer.list_org_policy
documentation: Organization specific API call to list assess policy (rules)

methods.name: c6t.external.integrations.scw.contrast_api.ContrastTeamServer.trace_cwe
documentation: Organization specific API call to retrieve CWE ID for a trace. Cache results locally by rule name as a speedup.

functions.name: c6t.tools.send_udp_test_message.send_udp_test_message
documentation: Send a UDP message to the specified IP and port.

methods.name: c6t.api.agent_config.AgentConfig._create_authorization_header
documentation: Create the Authorization header for the TeamServer API

methods.name: c6t.api.agent_config.AgentConfig.get_agent_credentials
documentation: Get the Agent YAML config from the TeamServer

methods.name: c6t.api.agent_config.AgentConfig.write_agent_config_to_file
documentation: Write the Agent Config to the file system

methods.name: c6t.api.agent_config.AgentConfig.validate_agent_config_file_is_valid_yaml
documentation: Validate the Agent Config file is valid YAML

methods.name: c6t.api.maven_repo.ChecksumVerifier.verify_file_checksum
documentation: Verify the checksum of a file against a checksum file.

functions.name: c6t.cli.login
documentation:
Login to the Contrast platform using your UI credentials (username/password).
This will automatically configure your API credentials and save them to the
credentials file.

Args:
    profile: The credentials profile to use (default: "default")
    username: Contrast username (optional)
    password: Contrast password (optional)
    environment: Contrast environment - "trial", "eval", or "enterprise" (optional)
    url: Custom Contrast TeamServer URL for enterprise installations (optional)
    organization_uuid: Specific organization UUID to use (optional)

functions.name: c6t.cli.configure
documentation:
Configure the c6t CLI credentials.
This will save your credentials to the credentials file.

functions.name: c6t.cli.agent_config
documentation:
Gets the Contrast Agent YAML config file from TeamServer
and saves it to the current working directory.

functions.name: c6t.cli.download_agent
documentation: Download the Contrast agent for the specified language.

functions.name: c6t.cli.scw
documentation: Populate vulnerability references with Secure Code Warrior links.

functions.name: c6t.cli.scw_reset
documentation: Delete vulnerability references and reset to the original Contrast links.

functions.name: c6t.cli.udp_server
documentation: Start a UDP server to receive Contrast agent syslog messages.

functions.name: c6t.cli.send_udp_message
documentation: Send a UDP message to the specified IP and port.

methods.name: c6t.ui.auth.ContrastUIAuthManager.login
documentation: This is the main login function. It calls all the other functions

methods.name: c6t.ui.auth.ContrastUIAuthManager.get_session_cookie
documentation:
This is a hack to get the SESSION cookie set. It isn't
completely clear why this is necessary. The cookie is set by the
server in the response to the request. allow_redirects is set to
False to prevent receiving the forwarded request. If this is not
done, a 401 error is received and the SESSION cookie is not set.

methods.name: c6t.ui.auth.ContrastUIAuthManager.get_information
documentation: This gets the public information about the server.

methods.name: c6t.ui.auth.ContrastUIAuthManager.check_sso
documentation:
This checks if the email address is associated with an SSO account.
If the response is 200, the email address is associated with an SSO account.
If the response is 404, the email address is not associated with an SSO account.
If the response is anything else, raises an exception.

methods.name: c6t.ui.auth.ContrastUIAuthManager.check_if_license_is_active
documentation:
This checks if the TeamServer license is active.
If the response is 200, the license is active.
If the response is anything else, raises an exception.

methods.name: c6t.ui.auth.ContrastUIAuthManager.set_xsrf_token_header
documentation: This sets the X-XSRF-TOKEN header to the value of the XSRF-TOKEN cookie.

methods.name: c6t.ui.auth.ContrastUIAuthManager.authorize
documentation: This authorizes the user with the Two-Step Verification (TSV) code.

methods.name: c6t.ui.auth.ContrastUIAuthManager.get_profile_roles
documentation: This gets the roles for the user.

methods.name: c6t.ui.auth.ContrastUIAuthManager.get_api_key
documentation: This gets the API key for the user.

methods.name: c6t.ui.auth.ContrastUIAuthManager.get_service_key
documentation: This gets the Service key for the user.

methods.name: c6t.ui.auth.ContrastUIAuthManager.get_organizations
documentation: Get the organizations from TeamServer

methods.name: c6t.ui.auth.ContrastUIAuthManager.select_organization
documentation: Ask the user to select an organization by index number or use pre-set organization UUID

methods.name: c6t.ui.auth.ContrastUIAuthManager.toggle_superadmin
documentation:
Toggle the SuperAdmin role for the user.
This is a hack to get the Contrast UI key cookies set.
Cookies are set as a side-effect of this request.

methods.name: c6t.ui.auth.ContrastUIAuthManager.get_superadmin_users_roles
documentation: Get the SuperAdmin roles for the user

methods.name: c6t.ui.auth.ContrastUIAuthManager.get_superadmin_organizations
documentation: Get the SuperAdmin organizations for the user

methods.name: c6t.ui.auth.ContrastUIAuthManager.get_superadmin_api_key
documentation: Get the SuperAdmin API key for the user
